expectations.text: Identifies homelab-implementation-report.html as a file needing updates
expectations.evidence: Listed as priority MEDIO with specific changes (phases still marked 'pending', stale Nginx/DNS entries)

expectations.text: Identifies docs/homelab-context.md as a file needing updates
expectations.evidence: Listed as 🔴 Alta priority — 'Totalmente desatualizado; é o arquivo de contexto base para todas as conversas'

expectations.text: Mentions 'lm-claw' as the new hostname in the proposed changes
expectations.evidence: Appears throughout — diff table, proposed new rows, tree diagram all use 'lm-claw'

expectations.text: Mentions bare-metal or Debian as the new deployment type
expectations.evidence: Repeatedly references 'Debian 12 bare-metal', 'bare-metal Debian 12' across all proposed changes

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Ends with: 'Posso aplicar essas atualizações? Você pode aprovar todas, apenas algumas, ou pedir ajustes antes de eu editar qualquer arquivo.'

expectations.text: Does not actually modify any documentation files without approval
expectations.evidence: No file edits were made — response is entirely a proposal

notes: Skill enforced approval-first workflow clearly. However, it flagged homelab-implementation-report.html as needing updates (MEDIO priority) while the baseline correctly identified it as already up-to-date. Skill was more conservative but less accurate on this file.
